name: init_refines_external_body_unconstrained
reason: `init_refines` is `external_body` — it asserts rl3 init refines to rl1 init without proof; if the refinement is wrong, the entire rl3→rl1 abstraction chain is unsound

name: rl3_init_external_body_unconstrained
reason: `rl3::init` is `closed spec` `external_body` — its precondition is opaque, so `init_refines` can derive any property of the rl1 interpretation without the rl3 init condition being verifiably checked

name: rl3_interp_external_body_no_constraint
code:
proof fn phi_3_rl3_interp_external_body_no_constraint(s1: crate::rl3::State, s2: crate::rl3::State)
    requires
        s1.pt_mem === s2.pt_mem,
        s1.sbuf === s2.sbuf,
        s1.writes === s2.writes,
        s1.happy == s2.happy,
        s1.phys_mem === s2.phys_mem,
        s1.tlbs === s2.tlbs,
    ensures
        s1.interp().happy == s2.interp().happy,
{
}
reason: `rl3::State::interp` is `external_body` `closed spec` — structurally equal rl3 states should produce equal rl2 interpretations, but the interp function is completely opaque and unverified

name: os_init_pml4_region_in_allocated
code:
proof fn phi_4_os_init_pml4_region_in_allocated(c: crate::os::Constants, s: crate::os::State)
    requires
        crate::os::init(c, s),
    ensures
        s.os_ext.allocated.contains(crate::defs::MemRegion { base: s.mmu@.pt_mem.pml4 as nat, size: 4096 }),
{
}
reason: OS init requires the PML4 region is in `allocated` — tests that the allocated set is correctly initialized; if wrong, the PML4 page could be reallocated for other uses

name: os_init_empty_pml4_entries
code:
proof fn phi_5_os_init_empty_pml4_entries(c: crate::os::Constants, s: crate::os::State, i: usize)
    requires
        crate::os::init(c, s),
        0 <= i < 512,
    ensures
        s.mmu@.pt_mem.read(add(s.mmu@.pt_mem.pml4, mul(i, 8))) == 0,
{
}
reason: OS init requires all 512 PML4 entries are zero — tests that the page table starts empty; non-zero entries at init would create phantom mappings before the OS sets up its address space
